output:
# Sales Action Plan — The Westmore Hotel Dallas

## Situation Read
- Independent boutique, 220 keys, $189 ADR, 62% occupancy — leaving roughly 18 points of demand on the table mid-week (Sun–Tue).
- Strong physical assets (4 halls, 600-pax capacity, in-house + outdoor catering) under-monetized against a weak weekday corporate base.
- Downtown Dallas demand drivers (Dallas Medical District, Texas Health, AT&T HQ, Convention Center) are within 10 miles but no concentrated outbound program exists.

## Top 3 Priorities — Next 30 Days
1. Open **15 net-new corporate negotiated rate (LNR) conversations** with Dallas-area accounts that book 200+ room nights/year.
2. Convert **3 group leads ≥ 80 room nights** focused on Sun–Tue arrival patterns.
3. Stand up a **Sun–Tue "Project Team" rate** for medical and consulting long-stay segments (7+ nights).

## Team Assignments — This Week
| Agent | Deliverable |
|---|---|
| Lead Generation | 15 Dallas-area corporate, medical, university targets with decision-maker titles |
| Outbound Sales | 3 cold email templates (corporate / medical / university) — US business tone |
| Account Relationship Manager | Re-engagement plan for top 5 dormant accounts from last 12 months |
| RFP Closing | Refresh Westmore RFP boilerplate with 2026 amenities and sustainability copy |
| LNR Closing | Build LNR rate ladder ($165 / $179 / $189) with volume tiers |
| Group Sales | Pitch deck for Sun–Tue arrival groups (medical, association, sports) |
| Meeting & Catering | Day Meeting Package at $79/pp + outdoor reception package at $145/pp |
| After-Sales | Post-stay follow-up sequence + Google review ask |
| Customer Revenue & Retention | Win-back offer for guests who haven't stayed in 9+ months |
| Revenue & Leadership | Weekly KPI dashboard — STR Index, segment mix, on-the-books pace |

## KPIs to Watch
- **Mid-week occupancy** (Sun–Tue): 62% → **72%** within 60 days
- **ADR**: $189 → **$195** (mix shift to corporate negotiated)
- **Group room nights on the books, next 90 days**: +**450**
- **Outbound emails sent / week**: 100 (target reply rate ≥ 8%)
- **RFP win rate**: target **45%**

## Reporting Cadence
- Daily standup 9:00 AM CT
- Weekly leadership review Mondays 4:00 PM CT
- Monthly STR & segment review first Tuesday of each month
